# PERF-97 negative: proto.Marshal hoisted out of the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-097-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"google.golang.org/protobuf/proto"
)

type Msg struct {
	Text string
}

func MarshalAll(messages []*Msg) []byte {
	if len(messages) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return marshalOne(messages[0])
}

func marshalOne(m *Msg) []byte {
	data, _ := proto.Marshal(m)
	return data
}
